creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Jason,
This new version is working quite well for me - I am using it to RDP to a Windows 10 instance running in a bhyve on a daily basis, from the FreeBSD 12 host.

I am not getting any core dumps.

I don’t have any HyperV guests to test against, however that is likely related to net/freerdp rather than the net/remmina port? Could this be a similar issue to that breakage introduced by a recent MS Windows patch in PR#226651 (unlikely given you reported this a month early)...

Let me try to do some testing with vnc also, to see if I can replicate the scaling issue.
